EmailTemplate.name: AN - Payroll details reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder to update your payroll details
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
DON'T FORGET TO ADD YOUR PAYROLL DETAILS.
Hi {!User.FirstName},
This is gentle reminder to login to your Alliance Portal and update your payroll details. Once we've got that, we can generate your employment contract and book you in for an Induction. Then you're ready to accept shifts!
Please head over to the Portal to update your profile: {Link to candidate portal}
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to call us on 1300 034 494.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
